title: Mark 04b
wikitext:
[]: Mark 04b Post by Rahxephon » Fri Jun 07, 2013 11:19 am Couldnt find the thread dedicated to these mark 04 if there is one move it there onegaishimasu! i just had a question... how come some of you seem to think the mark 04b and as too i guess were put there by SEELE to stop NERV from retrieving unit 01? The box on the tesseract that the mark 04b pops out of has an obvious NERV logo plastered right on front, so it seems to be protection from Gendo so no one messes with 'HIS' unit 01 no?

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jun 07, 2013 11:34 am The Capabilites of the Nemesis Series is the best thread to ask questions and get answers on any topics to do with the 04 units.
